# MuleSoft MuleSoft AI Chain Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.0) of MuleSoft AI Chain Connector documentation.
> See [MuleSoft AI Chain Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mulesoft-ai-chain-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the MuleSoft AI Chain Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Configuring Agent Operations](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mulesoft-ai-chain-connector/latest/configuring-agent-operations.md)
- [Configuring Chat Operations](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mulesoft-ai-chain-connector/latest/configuring-chat-operations.md)
- [Configuring Embeddings Operations](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mulesoft-ai-chain-connector/latest/configuring-embeddings-operations.md)
- [Configuring Image Generation Operations](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mulesoft-ai-chain-connector/latest/configuring-image-generation-operations.md)
- [Configuring RAG Operations](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mulesoft-ai-chain-connector/latest/configuring-rag-operations.md)
- [Configuring Sentiment Operations](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mulesoft-ai-chain-connector/latest/configuring-sentiment-operations.md)
- [Configuring Tools Operations](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mulesoft-ai-chain-connector/latest/configuring-tools-operations.md)
- [MuleSoft AI Chain Connector 1.0](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mulesoft-ai-chain-connector/latest/index.md)
- [MuleSoft AI Chain - Additional Configuration Information](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mulesoft-ai-chain-connector/latest/mulesoft-ai-chain-additional-config.md)
- [Using Anypoint Code Builder to Configure MuleSoft AI Chain Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mulesoft-ai-chain-connector/latest/mulesoft-ai-chain-connector-config-acb.md)

- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure MuleSoft AI Chain Connector 1.0](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mulesoft-ai-chain-connector/latest/mulesoft-ai-chain-connector-studio.md)
- [MuleSoft AI Chain Connector 1.0 XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mulesoft-ai-chain-connector/latest/mulesoft-ai-chain-connector-xml-maven.md)
